title: ECharts Segment 11
summary: This segment spans PRs #19632-#20627, covering ECharts v5.6.0 development. Major areas include graph chart thumbnail/roaming features, custom series reusable renderItem and CompoundPath support, treemap cursor/breadcrumb fixes, coordinate system enhancements (axis custom values, ticks overflow, geo/map region styling), aria accessibility improvements (role="img", SSR safety, label data exclusion), dataZoom handle/cursor fixes, candlestick non-normal states, tooltip XSS prevention, and geo/map region styling with GeoJSON support.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: This segment spans PRs #19632-#20627, covering ECharts v5.6.0 development. Major areas include graph chart thumbnail/roaming features, custom series reusable renderItem and CompoundPath support, treemap cursor/breadcrumb fixes, coordinate system enhancements (axis custom values, ticks overflow, geo/map region styling), aria accessibility improvements (role="img", SSR safety, label data exclusion), dataZoom handle/cursor fixes, candlestick non-normal states, tooltip XSS prevention, and geo/map region styling with GeoJSON support.

nodes.label: Core Utilities
nodes.description: Shared utilities including types.ts (updated with new typing for sankey, tooltip, graph), time.ts (meridian template), layout.ts, and graphic.ts. Touched by PRs 19763, 19888, 20045, 20051, 20084, 20218 and multi-PR refactors.

nodes.label: ECharts Core
nodes.description: Core echarts.ts with init safety, roam controller host integration, and custom series installer registration. Touched by PRs 20044, 20051, 20084 and multi-PR refactors.

nodes.label: Graph Chart
nodes.description: Major feature work: Thumbnail component for graph overview, GraphView roaming enhancements, GraphSeries options for node/link styling. The largest module by LOC in this segment. Touched by PRs 20226, 20249, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402.

nodes.label: Custom Series
nodes.description: CustomSeries, CustomView, and customSeriesRegister updates for reusable renderItem function and CompoundPath element support. Touched by PRs 20226, 20249, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402.

nodes.label: Tree Chart
nodes.description: TreeView updates related to graph/tree shared roaming and thumbnail support. Touched by PRs 20226, 20249, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402.

nodes.label: Treemap Chart
nodes.description: TreemapView (custom cursor support, breadcrumb fixes), TreemapSeries type definitions. Touched by PRs 20030, 20113, 20249, 20313, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402, 20557.

nodes.label: Bar Charts
nodes.description: PictorialBarView (zero-value symbol flip fix), BarView (borderColor large data fix), and BarSeries layout integration. Touched by PRs 20030, 20249, 20300, 20402, 20465, 20557.

nodes.label: Pie Chart
nodes.description: PieView, pieLayout (empty circle endAngle fix), and labelLayout (pie label visibility). Touched by PRs 19642, 20074.

nodes.label: Sankey Chart
nodes.description: SankeyView (border-radius support) and SankeySeries (undefined options safety). Touched by PRs 19763, 20249, 20380, 20402.

nodes.label: Line Chart
nodes.description: LineView stepped-line area null handling and memory reduction. Touched by PRs 20092, 20161.

nodes.label: Candlestick Chart
nodes.description: CandlestickSeries, CandlestickView, and candlestickVisual for non-normal state styling support. Touched by PR 20105.

nodes.label: Sunburst Chart
nodes.description: SunburstPiece and SunburstSeries for relative focus feature. Touched by PRs 20249, 20399, 20402.

nodes.label: Gauge Chart
nodes.description: GaugeView negative z2 fix. Touched by PRs 20226, 20276, 20304.

nodes.label: Map Chart
nodes.description: MapSeries region silent/styling support for GeoJSON-based maps. Touched by PRs 20564, 20566.

nodes.label: Chart Helpers
nodes.description: createClipPathFromCoordSys (polar clipping), whiskerBoxCommon (boxplot encode category axis). Touched by PRs 20101, 20249, 20324, 20402, 20557.

nodes.label: Component Helpers
nodes.description: MapDraw (GeoJSON region styling, roam integration), RoamController and roamHelper for shared roaming infrastructure. Touched by PRs 19837, 20226, 20249, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402, 20561, 20564, 20566.

nodes.label: Tooltip Component
nodes.description: TooltipView (pointer-events, notMerge NPE), TooltipHTMLContent (lineHeight default, XSS legend-name prevention), tooltipMarkup. Touched by PRs 20045, 20051, 20084, 20398, 20435.

nodes.label: Legend Component
nodes.description: LegendView and legendAction (action isolation for linked charts). Touched by PR 20129.

nodes.label: VisualMap Component
nodes.description: ContinuousView (disabled pointer cursor), PiecewiseView (handle label collision), and related model updates. Touched by PRs 20249, 20551, 20557.

nodes.label: DataZoom Component
nodes.description: SliderZoomView (handleLabel show, moveHandler cursor) and SliderZoomModel. Touched by PRs 20082, 20249, 20304, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402, 20557.

nodes.label: Axis Components
nodes.description: AxisBuilder (ticks grid overflow), CartesianAxisView (axis custom values). Touched by PRs 20114, 20226, 20249, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402, 20484.

nodes.label: Marker Components
nodes.description: MarkerModel and MarkLineModel (symbolOffset 2D array, formatter series context). Touched by PRs 19898, 20491.

nodes.label: Calendar Component
nodes.description: CalendarView label silent property. Touched by PR 20492.

nodes.label: Coordinate System Core
nodes.description: axisCommonTypes, axisTickLabelBuilder, axisHelper, scaleRawExtentInfo, and Axis.ts. Covers axis custom values, ticks overflow, inversed time bandwidth, and splitLine min/max lines. Touched by PRs 19919, 20030, 20114, 20194, 20226, 20246, 20249, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402.

nodes.label: Cartesian Coordinate
nodes.description: Grid.ts and CartesianAxisModel for cartesian axis handling. Touched by PRs 20226, 20249, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402.

nodes.label: Geo Coordinate
nodes.description: Region.ts, GeoModel, geoCreator for GeoJSON region styling and geo roam totalZoom event. Touched by PRs 20561, 20564, 20566.

nodes.label: Polar Coordinate
nodes.description: Polar.ts polar coordinate clipping fix. Touched by PRs 20249, 20370, 20402.

nodes.label: Visual / Aria
nodes.description: aria.ts accessibility enhancements: role="img" attribute, SSR safety, label data exclusion, and aria test coverage. Touched by PRs 19892, 20050, 20218.

nodes.label: Data Layer
nodes.description: SeriesData (rawIndexOf NPE), DataStore, sourceHelper (bigint handling), dataValueHelper. Touched by PRs 19847, 20315, 20534, 20564.

nodes.label: Model Layer
nodes.description: Series.ts and Global.ts model definitions. Touched by PRs 19901, 20226, 20249, 20324, 20329, 20348, 20402.

nodes.label: Layout
nodes.description: barGrid.ts and barPolar.ts layout calculations. Touched by release-related PRs.

nodes.label: Animation
nodes.description: customGraphicTransition for custom series transition support. Touched by PRs 20249, 20402.

nodes.label: Theme
nodes.description: dark.ts theme (dark legend page text color fix). Touched by PRs 20249, 20396, 20402.

nodes.label: Extension API
nodes.description: Extension entry point for shared imports and types. Touched by PRs 20249, 20324, 20329, 20402.

nodes.label: Data Processors
nodes.description: dataSample.ts min/max sampling behavior fix. Touched by PR 20315.

nodes.label: Internationalization
nodes.description: i18n source (langSV, langFA, langPT-br) and compiled dist bundles. Portuguese translation update and new locale additions. Touched by PRs 20227, 20312, 20348, 20556.

nodes.label: Build System
nodes.description: testDts.js TypeScript 3.5 compatibility tests and build infrastructure. Touched by PR 19696.

nodes.label: Project Infrastructure
nodes.description: GitHub workflow dependencies, npm package ignore files, workspace TypeScript prompt. Touched by PRs 19695, 20030, 20123.

edges.label: types.ts defines tooltip callback signatures
shared type definitions and helper functions

shared axis types and helpers
